title: Cookable Tropical Fish
description: This mod makes tropical fish finally cookable.
body:
This mod simply makes tropical fish cookable. It is quite difficult to determine why tropical fish were not cookable in the first place, as it would make very little sense to consume tropical fish raw. Thus, with this mod, you shall finally be able to cook your tropical fish.

Cooked tropical fish restores the same amount of health and saturation as other types of cooked fish. Similar to other types of food, it can be obtained through furnace cooking, smoking, or campfire cooking.
